title: 🌀 Anomalous Glyph Drift
name: Anomalous Glyph Drift
what_it_is: The phenomenon where glyphs escape their intended meaning and begin drifting—accumulating unintended symbolic charge or behaving like sentient signs.
how_to_use: the glyphs have left the page—they orbit her, mutating beyond control
he chases the drift-signs, trying to trap the one that once meant home
animation_behavior: Glyphs detach and drift, symbols morph mid-air, meaning slides across forms as context shifts ---
